title: Chiseled enchanting table
description: A new way to get enchantment using chiseled bookshelves with enchanted book.
body:
# Chiseled Enchanting Table

A Minecraft Fabric mod that enhances the enchanting experience.

## Features

* Add a new chiseled enchanting table
* Unlock new enchantment for chiseled enchanting table by placing enchanted book in nearby chiseled bookshelves. No more RNG!
* A custom UI to apply enchantment to your item!
* Explore your world to discover new enchanted books!
* Replaced bookshelves by chiseled bookshelves in structure that might contain powerful enchanted book.
![Crafting recipe for chiseled enchanting table](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8970f5056dbabdbc224e2105270b6f816593a60.png)

![The chiseled enchanting table UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/052be9b4bccdebac87754fcc419747ba0ccaeae5.png)

![Chiseled enchanting table with filled chiseled bookshelves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1698c1ca1fac07360fd76335e2f74c093af2d995.png)
![Mansion with chiseled bookshelf](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e91dd1e6107f0e86822b7a2c4095c8da593be51e.png)
